meaning: n.球,天体,圆形物vt.弄圆,成球形,围着,vi.<古>沿着轨道移动
examples: The moon's round orb would shine high in the sky, casting its velvety light on everything.
"I'm disappointed, " McGaughey said after Orb finished fourth and Oxbow pulled off the upset Saturday.
McGaughey and Orb were certainly on a high in the two weeks since the Derby.
